pred_reason: The contract at 0x251e9cc4318b22fbe6f388bd377eaaa3afadb22f contains a gas-intensive loop in includeAccount() that iterates over an unbounded array. This violates SWC-107 as it risks exceeding block gas limits if the array grows too large, leading to denial-of-service. Evidence: includeAccount() function identified with potential gas-denial-of-service risk; Loop iterates over _excluded array which can become arbitrarily large; Worst-case gas cost could exceed block gas limit per audit findings
